nodes.title: LOAD LORAS HERE - Multi LoRA Stack

extra.name: Krea2 Red Mix SeedVR2 Apple Silicon

comfyMobile.title: Krea2 Red Mix SeedVR2 Apple Silicon
comfyMobile.note: Native Krea2 Red Mix FP8/scaled Apple Silicon workflow with Qwen3VL text encoder, Qwen image VAE, and SeedVR2 7B MPS upscaling branch.

recommendedSettings.kreaModel: Krea2RedMix-10Steps-bf16-dequant-ComfyUI.safetensors via UNETLoader; dequantized from the Red Mix FP8 file for MPS compatibility.
recommendedSettings.seedVR2: Disabled by default for lighter base Krea2 generations. Re-enable nodes 66, 67, 68, and 69 to run the SeedVR2 upscaling branch.
recommendedSettings.outputs: Krea2_RedMix saves the base image; Krea2SeedVR2 saves the SeedVR2 upscaled image.

notes.loraStack: Krea2MLXMultiLoRAStack feeds enabled Krea2 LoRA rows into Krea2MLXRedMixSampler and the native MLX sidecar. Starter rows are disabled by default.

workflowMetadata.title: Krea2 Red Mix SeedVR2 Apple Silicon
workflowMetadata.note: Native MLX Krea2 Red Mix workflow for Apple Silicon. Base generation uses Krea2MLXRedMixSampler with fused MXFP8 Red Mix; SeedVR2 remains disabled by default and can be re-enabled as an optional branch.

models.kreaModel: redmix_mxfp8_fused.safetensors via Krea2MLXRedMixSampler custom node; fused MXFP8 native MLX path.
models.clip: Qwen3VL text encoder loaded by the native Krea2 MLX pipeline.
models.vae: Qwen image VAE loaded by the native Krea2 MLX pipeline.
models.seedVR2: Disabled by default for lighter base Krea2 generations. Re-enable nodes 66, 67, 68, and 69 to run the SeedVR2 upscaling branch.
models.outputs: Krea2_RedMix saves the base MLX image; Krea2SeedVR2 saves the optional SeedVR2 upscaled image.

workflowMetadata.performance: Default stays 10 steps for the exact Red Mix quality path. 4 steps is only a preview/speed diagnostic and is not used as the main workflow default.
